headline: Apple, Google Directed To Remove TikTok From Respective App Stores By Jan 19: Here's What You Need To Know
summary: U.S. lawmakers have demanded Apple and Google remove TikTok from their app stores by Jan. 19 if ByteDance fails to divest its U.S. operations, following a federal court ruling citing national security concerns.

headline: Tesla Hikes Model S Price By Whopping $5,000 In US
summary: EV giant Tesla Inc on Friday increased the starting price of its Model S premium sedan in the U.S. by a whopping $5000 to $79,990, the same starting price as the Model X.
